title: Verify Trial Corner is mutually exclusive to other onboarding experiments
description: Test that a user assigned to the Trial Corner cohort does not see any other pre-trial or post-trial onboarding experiments.
preconditions: User is assigned to the Trial Corner cohort

steps.description: 1. Log in as a user who is part of the Trial Corner experiment.
2. Navigate through the app, specifically to areas where other onboarding experiments might appear.

expected_result: No other onboarding experiments are displayed to the user.
